แพลงตอนจะตาย
The second one say my username
have u seen the new r99 patch
but i ate yummy food so
but in my province is no momo
oh u live in other province?
i went to chiang mai or sth
i hope i can go other parts of Thailand
un south it have very very spicy food
and also some place was danger
i think my spicy level goes up cuz of Thailand restaurants to be exact lmao
i went to Kub Kha Kub Pla
almost every food is spicy but they are so good
it was spicy food final boss for me
look like the one u guys showed me last time
raw peppers are yikes but i can do it
this is more spicy and mostly eat in south
in other part it less spicy
usually peppers are cooked down or shredded
this one is pure raw peppers
if its so delicious that the spiciness doesnt bother then so be it
if its cooked then i can def eat it
some vietnamese broths have cooked string peppers like that
and i like to eat them
thats why we (vietnamese) love thai food too much
but in original not has any of this it only meat and spicy
i can’t find any vietnamese that hates Thai food
but flavor wised? we all love Thai food
my family is obsessed with Thai food
we sea are share the same tast
esp my mom and my siblings
my mom loves cooking and she is super strict about eating
but she is easily defeated by Thai food
my grandma is even stricter than my mom but still love every Thai food we eat

cus thai food is put all the flavor and bomb it 
delicious
but she likes thai food than chinese food
she went to chinese rural areas and she hates those flavor
i ate a chinese restaurant (cuz of tiktok) but it was kinda overrated
i would rather eat all Thai
some chainese food was to   oil
viet and thai likes to add chillies AND limes
it a few good chainese food
the worst thing i would ever do is to send my grandma to eat chinese food in other countries
if the food isnt good, she will roast that place
and ofc scold me for leading her into those kind of restaurants
my grandma used to have a dumpling stall at her street, super popular
never argue with her about food
is she is a secret master of food
she used to have a stall AND raise her own animals to get food
cus she see them at start and end
u can never fool her with lower quality chicken or pig
thats why she is the real deal
she raises those animals and cook them too
even then she still loses over Thai food
u know how good it is
thai food is like a cheat code
more you put it more the flavor rise
ajino moto also has soy sauce
oh yeh vn also uses this
some thia resturant has put it very very much
they just want a quick broth tho
they put those msg in broth
but i still put it a little

a lil, yes
a lot, no
at least we put spices and herbs in broth, not only salt and pepper
and yes, a lime to finish at the end
idk thai opinion on viet food tho
but i think they would easily eat them
i dont know what i eat is vn
cus the flavor isn't much differnt
i think the biggest different is
vn likes to have raw greens as sides
like we put a lot of fresh greens in
but flavor and spice, pretty much kinda similar
thai also have a green thing
we use it in every thing
im not really sure what is in there
it have more but i dont know
tbh not really that much different
bánh mì is the easiest one
but i think u can try more rice dish
vietnam is master when it comes to rice dish
i have this in my school resturant

bánh tráng = rice paper
trộn = mixed
this one is one of the most ethnic vietnamese dish u can find
u may know Bánh Mì so i wont explain that
i think rice paper could be find in Thai
it my school the name was vn bread
if there is vietnamese lives in Thai
they would either sell rice papers or bánh mì
it was a fist time i see this
i forgot u live at the south
i think u could find rice paper in bangkok easily
how can u guys have russian food tho
cus a lot of russian come to my province
but we personalize it into more vietnamese style

like basil -> cilantro
cheese -> creamy butter paste
thats how we have Bánh Mì

thai also have american egg 
fried rice that doesn't have in usa
bur every thing is so american stlye
i search vn food  on grab
my siblings also used Grab to order food to the hotel we stayed
grab is generic food derivery in sea
but in my school it was so underrate
its fine, there are good and bad bánh mì places
maybe cuz south thailand is different there
bangkok is a bit different cuz viet usually goes there
i saw a lot of rice papers in bangkok
cus it was like a black sheep on south thailand
i never know russian would come to south thailand
like in some place it has eng rus cn but no thai title on their resturant
so maybe westerners like to come to Thai
this is also a dish come from French
maybe, i could try to go to other provinces in Thai
start to go south maybe hehe
it has 3 province that have bordder problem
and some place isn't save but most of all it save
so hope you don't unlucky and pop on secret area
or like u get kidnap and get sold to other countries?
like you travel and go to some place
like it have a news that some place was get bomb
Its okay if we are en ch we would be the better one
she carrying ultra in th chat
Dont forget to use our superior tuff spam channel too <#1355632527263404032>
i cant access to that channel
Wtf, i thought I enter wrong chat channel
where did this eng alien came from <@523084324724146193>
He has Thai role... he's already become Thai resident
เห็นแล้วหิวเลย ไปชงบ้างดีมั้ยนะ

Crystal facets hold light and shadow still, refracting brilliant colors.
A dream not yet awoken quietly drifts across the sky above,
Striking up the city's dazzling night.
The musicians are in position, awaiting your seat.
